pages.name: home
pages.title: Love More
pages.metaDescription:
Love More Hot Yoga was founded on the principles of spreading LOVE, 
teaching others, caring MORE, and allowing someone to find their personal 
best. The practice of yoga gives a person the ability to add more love to 
their life. There are no judgments, no egos, just LOVE.

sections.html:
Connection

Find home in our healing services, where a range of offerings awaits to bring harmony and rejuvenation to both your physical and spiritual selves.
sections.text: ConnectionFind home in our healing services, where a range of offerings awaits to bring harmony and rejuvenation to both your physical and spiritual selves.

sections.html:
Who is Love More?

We're a warm-hearted community here to lead you on a self-love journey through movement, community, and connection. Through our classes, events, trainings, retreats, and healing services, our mission is to embrace the art of learning to LOVE MORE. 
So welcome to the Love More family! It’s about finding your people, rooting into your authentic self, and exploring your potential. We’re here to support you every step of the way!

sections.html: Heated Classes Non-Heated Classes
sections.text:
Heated Classes 
  Non-Heated Classes

sections.html: Our studio is dedicated to providing holistic and enriching movement experiences that nurture the mind, body, and spirit. With a diverse range of classes led by experienced instructors, we invite you to explore the myriad paths of yoga, sculpting, and dance each tailored to meet your unique journey. Whether you're a seasoned yogi or just beginning to explore moving your body in new ways, our classes are designed to guide you toward a deeper connection with yourself, fostering self-love, mindfulness, and inner harmony. Step onto your mat and embark on a voyage of self-discovery and growth.
sections.text: Our studio is dedicated to providing holistic and enriching movement experiences that nurture the mind, body, and spirit. With a diverse range of classes led by experienced instructors, we invite you to explore the myriad paths of yoga, sculpting, and dance each tailored to meet your unique journey. Whether you're a seasoned yogi or just beginning to explore moving your body in new ways, our classes are designed to guide you toward a deeper connection with yourself, fostering self-love, mindfulness, and inner harmony. Step onto your mat and embark on a voyage of self-discovery and growth.

headings.text: EXPERIENCE THE MANY BENEFITS OF HEAT

Power Flow is a vinyasa yoga class that focuses on building strength, alignment,  flexibility, core, and stamina. This faster paced class combines traditional yoga postures with more intense movements and cardiovascular exercises while promoting focused breathing and mindfulness. Power Flow includes a series of challenging sequences designed to challenge both the body and the mind. It’ll help build muscle tone, aid in stress relief, and mental clarity.

* Each class will end with an extended period of relaxation (savasana) and cool lavender cloths.  Power Flow (hot) is heated to above body temperature and approximately 40% humidity to maximize your flow, increase oxygen levels and improve the mind and body connection.

Flow (warm)  is a yoga class that typically focuses on slow and smooth movements combined with deep breathing and relaxation techniques. It is great for all levels, including beginners, and those looking for a more soothing and grounding practice. You can expect gentle stretches, poses, and sequences that promote flexibility, balance, and stress relief. This class is a great way to unwind, release tensions, and connect with your body and breath.

*Each class will end with an extended period of relaxation (savasana) and cool lavender cloths. Flow (warm) is heated to below body temperature and approximately 40% humidity to maximize your flow, increase oxygen levels, and improve the mind and body connection.

Come experience the combination of vinyasa, core, and mobility exercises to enhance balance, strength, and flexibility. Our Functional Flow practice focuses on creating stability and comfort through precise alignment and mindful movement. This class will help you further develop your physical stability which may positively impact your emotional and mental well-being. The practice encourages a dynamic yet grounded and expressive experience within each pose.
*Each class will end with an extended period of relaxation (savasana) and cool lavender cloths.
(Warm) is heated to below body temperature.

This is your Classic 26/2 Hot Yoga (Bikram style) class. It is a set sequence of 26 asanas (postures) and 2 pranayamas (breathing exercises). This sequence is completed twice throughout the 90-minute class. Designed to warm and stretch your muscles, ligaments, and tendons in the order that is most beneficial to the body. This is a 90-minute class practiced in a room heated to 105° F with 40% humidity.

Yoga Sculpt is a dynamic class that includes yoga poses with strength training exercises for a full-body workout. You may use light weights (dumbells) to tone and define targeted muscle groups. This class is set to an upbeat playlist and often includes cardio bursts to raise the heart rate and get the body moving.

The practice ends with a cool-down and relaxation period to calm the body and mind. This class is perfect for anyone looking for a challenging, full-body workout that combines the benefits of yoga and strength training. Whether you're a beginner or an experienced yogi, our Yoga Sculpt class is sure to leave you feeling energized and empowered.

Power Flow (Hot)
              

              
                Power Flow is a vinyasa yoga class that focuses on building strength, alignment,  flexibility, core, and stamina. This faster paced class combines traditional yoga postures with more intense movements and cardiovascular exercises while promoting focused breathing and mindfulness. Power Flow includes a series of challenging sequences designed to challenge both the body and the mind. It’ll help build muscle tone, aid in stress relief, and mental clarity. * Each class will end with an extended period of relaxation (savasana) and cool lavender cloths.  Power Flow (hot) is heated to above body temperature and approximately 40% humidity to maximize your flow, increase oxygen levels and improve the mind and body connection.

Flow (Warm)
              

              
                Flow (warm)  is a yoga class that typically focuses on slow and smooth movements combined with deep breathing and relaxation techniques. It is great for all levels, including beginners, and those looking for a more soothing and grounding practice. You can expect gentle stretches, poses, and sequences that promote flexibility, balance, and stress relief. This class is a great way to unwind, release tensions, and connect with your body and breath. *Each class will end with an extended period of relaxation (savasana) and cool lavender cloths. Flow (warm) is heated to below body temperature and approximately 40% humidity to maximize your flow, increase oxygen levels, and improve the mind and body connection.

Functional Flow (Warm)
              

              
                Come experience the combination of vinyasa, core, and mobility exercises to enhance balance, strength, and flexibility. Our Functional Flow practice focuses on creating stability and comfort through precise alignment and mindful movement. This class will help you further develop your physical stability which may positively impact your emotional and mental well-being. The practice encourages a dynamic yet grounded and expressive experience within each pose.*Each class will end with an extended period of relaxation (savasana) and cool lavender cloths. (Warm) is heated to below body temperature.

Bikram (Hot)
              

              
                This is your Classic 26/2 Hot Yoga (Bikram style) class. It is a set sequence of 26 asanas (postures) and 2 pranayamas (breathing exercises). This sequence is completed twice throughout the 90-minute class. Designed to warm and stretch your muscles, ligaments, and tendons in the order that is most beneficial to the body. This is a 90-minute class practiced in a room heated to 105° F with 40% humidity.

Yoga Sculpt (Warm)
              

              
                Yoga Sculpt is a dynamic class that includes yoga poses with strength training exercises for a full-body workout. You may use light weights (dumbells) to tone and define targeted muscle groups. This class is set to an upbeat playlist and often includes cardio bursts to raise the heart rate and get the body moving. The practice ends with a cool-down and relaxation period to calm the body and mind. This class is perfect for anyone looking for a challenging, full-body workout that combines the benefits of yoga and strength training. Whether you're a beginner or an experienced yogi, our Yoga Sculpt class is sure to leave you feeling energized and empowered.

headings.text: Helping you to LOVE MORE - Everyday

sections.html: Meet Our Team
sections.text: Meet Our Team

sections.html:
Helping you to LOVE MORE - Everyday

Welcome to Love More, where the journey of self-discovery and holistic well-being begins. Our studio stands as a haven for seekers of balance, mindfulness, and inner harmony. With a shared passion for nurturing both body and soul, our diverse team of dedicated instructors comes together to guide you on a transformative voyage through the art of yoga. At Love More, we believe in cultivating not only physical strength and flexibility but also a profound love and acceptance for oneself and others. Join us as we embark on towards a life enriched by movement, connection, and community.
sections.text: Helping you to LOVE MORE - EverydayWelcome to Love More, where the journey of self-discovery and holistic well-being begins. Our studio stands as a haven for seekers of balance, mindfulness, and inner harmony. With a shared passion for nurturing both body and soul, our diverse team of dedicated instructors comes together to guide you on a transformative voyage through the art of yoga. At Love More, we believe in cultivating not only physical strength and flexibility but also a profound love and acceptance for oneself and others. Join us as we embark on towards a life enriched by movement, connection, and community.

headings.text: Join Danielle for a fun and supportive aerial yoga class designed for all levels from first-timers to seasoned yogis.

Join JoEllen for a fun workshop focused on building a safe, sustainable foundation for inversions. We’ll refine shoulder and core alignment while exploring headstand, forearm stand, and handstand variations.
Join Sri Yantra for immersive gong and sound bowl vibrations that invite deep rest, release, and renewal.
Join us for a donation based class and outdoor flow. All donations go to NAMI!

sections.text:
Friday, March 13th Aerial Yoga
              

              
                Join Danielle for a fun and supportive aerial yoga class designed for all levels from first-timers to seasoned yogis.

Saturday, March 14th Inversion workshop
              

              
                Join JoEllen for a fun workshop focused on building a safe, sustainable foundation for inversions. We’ll refine shoulder and core alignment while exploring headstand, forearm stand, and handstand variations.

Saturday, March 14th Gong experience with Sri Yantra
              

              
                Join Sri Yantra for immersive gong and sound bowl vibrations that invite deep rest, release, and renewal.

Sunday, March 29th Yoga on the Patio @ Meribo
              

              
                Join us for a donation based class and outdoor flow. All donations go to NAMI!

headings.text: This retreat will take place at Finca Luna Nueva Lodge in the beautiful rainforest of Costa Rica.

Take a journey into the rainforest of Costa Rica to unveil your highest potential. Awaken your healing journey through breath work, yoga, sound, lymphatic releases, nervous system resets, adventure, and more!
EmpowerU Women's Wellness and Empowerment Retreat
Join JoEllen and Jax (alongside other healing practitioners) September 17-21, 2026 for our next EmpowerU - Women's Wellness and Empowerment Retreat.
This transformative and healing retreat is 5 days and 4 nights surrounded by breathtaking red rock mountains and energy vortexes of Sedona, Arizona.

sections.html: Retreats
sections.text: Retreats

sections.html:
Love More and Peace By Practice are excited to share

ROOTED:
A Rainforest Experience
sections.text: Love More and Peace By Practice are excited to shareROOTED:A Rainforest Experience

October 3rd-9th, 2026
              

              
                This retreat will take place at Finca Luna Nueva Lodge in the beautiful rainforest of Costa Rica. Take a journey into the rainforest of Costa Rica to unveil your highest potential. Awaken your healing journey through breath work, yoga, sound, lymphatic releases, nervous system resets, adventure, and more!

sections.html:
This retreat offers you the opportunity to move and raise your awareness to a higher way of being, meet challenges for personal growth, and embody the truth of who you are.

Our 7 Day/6 Night retreat will be spent offering you opportunities to deepen your connection with your higher self and take tools home with you to ensure you can continue to tap into your infinite potential. This is an all levels retreat with opportunities for multiple modalities of movement and body biohacking.

We will enjoy delicious, locally grown organic cuisine prepared from the farm we are staying on.
sections.text: This retreat offers you the opportunity to move and raise your awareness to a higher way of being, meet challenges for personal growth, and embody the truth of who you are. Our 7 Day/6 Night retreat will be spent offering you opportunities to deepen your connection with your higher self and take tools home with you to ensure you can continue to tap into your infinite potential. This is an all levels retreat with opportunities for multiple modalities of movement and body biohacking. We will enjoy delicious, locally grown organic cuisine prepared from the farm we are staying on.

sections.html:
Retreat price includes

  • Transportation from and to the airport (within given timeframe)

  • Room stay at the farm

  • 2/3 daily movement practices (flow, yin, restorative, soundbath, Nidra, roll outs, lymphatic drainage, facial conditioning, vagus nerve reset )

  • 3 meals a day

  • Meditations

  • Breathwork

  • Farm tour

  • Cacao tour and ceremony

  • Ecstatic dance

  • Waterfall tour

  • Nature hikes

  • Free time

  • Ice bath

  • Pool workouts

sections.html:
EmpowerU
Women's Wellness and Empowerment Retreat
sections.text: EmpowerU Women's Wellness and Empowerment Retreat

September 17-21
              

              
                Join JoEllen and Jax (alongside other healing practitioners) September 17-21, 2026 for our next EmpowerU - Women's Wellness and Empowerment Retreat.This transformative and healing retreat is 5 days and 4 nights surrounded by breathtaking red rock mountains and energy vortexes of Sedona, Arizona.

sections.html: EmpowerU will help you reconnect with yourself and tap into your inner truth and power. You'll have the opportunity to disconnect from the distractions of everyday life and focus on your personal growth and well-being.
sections.text: EmpowerU will help you reconnect with yourself and tap into your inner truth and power. You'll have the opportunity to disconnect from the distractions of everyday life and focus on your personal growth and well-being.

sections.html:
Activities Include:

  1. Yoga

  2. Meditation

  3. Breathwork

  4. Journaling

  5. Ice baths

  6. Ecstatic dance

  7. Hiking

  8. Sound baths

  9. Sauna

  10. Conscious conversations

  11. Empowering workshops

  12. plus so much more
sections.text: Activities Include:YogaMeditationBreathworkJournalingIce bathsEcstatic danceHikingSound bathsSaunaConscious conversationsEmpowering workshopsplus so much more

sections.html:
Other Opportunities include:

  • Connect with like-minded women

  • Experience transformative workshops and classes

  • Explore, hike, and take in the breathtaking views of Sedona's red rocks

  • Cook and nourish your body/soul with delicious, healthy meals

  • Participate in yoga, meditation, breathwork, and ecstatic dance sessions to recharge and rejuvenate your whole beingLearn powerful tools and techniques to shift your mindset and fill up your cup

  • Overcome limiting beliefs that are holding you back through guided journaling and energy readings

  • Plus ice baths, conscious conversations, sound baths, healing arts and crafts, and so much more

sections.html:
Your Stay also includes:

  1. lodging

  2. meals

  3. transportation to/from the airport

Don't miss out on this life-changing opportunity and investment in yourself by joining today! You must submit at least a $500 deposit to reserve a spot and start your journey toward a more confident and authentic you! Remaining retreat cost is due a month before the start of the retreat!


Investment:

  • Practitioner Price: $2000 Earlybird (Ends 6/17) / $2200 After

  • Participant Price: $2400 Early bird (Ends 6/17) / $2600 After

*Rooming options vary
*Double occupancy casita available at an additional price @ $300 per person (1 King Bed)
**IF YOU PREFER TO PAY VIA VENMO (@JoEllen Luke) OR ZELLE (Love More Hot Yoga, LLC 702-727-7265) TO AVOID CC FEES; SEND WITH YOUR NAME AND EMPOWERU AS A NOTE**


Have Questions? Please send us an email at theinvitationbyjax@gmail.com or text Jax at 504-908-5736.

sections.text:
Family Membership
          
          
            
              
                
                
              
            
          
        
      
      
        
          -Add up to 5 family members to this membership.-Unlimited access to classes.-Complimentary mat rental and sweat towel use.-Free mat storage service.-Free refills of Stealth Detox Water.-One free specialty class per month.-15% discount on retail items.-10% discount on Teacher Training programs.-One free 30-minute session of your choice: Performance coaching, Energy Reading, Reiki, or a private yoga session.-Two Buddy Passes per month, allowing free classes for new students.
